summary: Completed testing of Shíntergy construction equipment rental platform. Backend APIs fully functional with quote creation, PDF generation, and database persistence working correctly. Critical frontend issue identified: chat widget not opening, blocking main user flow.

email_issues.issue: PDF attachment serialization error: 'Object of type bytes is not JSON serializable'
API key in test mode - can only send to verified email (cezeulor123@gmail.com)
email_issues.impact: Cannot send emails to customer addresses

ui_bugs.issue: Chat widget not opening when 'Cotizar Ahora' button is clicked
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks main user flow - users cannot request quotes through chat
ui_bugs.location: HeroSection onClick handler not triggering state change in Home component

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test complete chat-to-API integration due to chat widget not opening

passed_tests: Landing page load with all sections
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix chat widget not opening when 'Cotizar Ahora' button is clicked. Check onClick handler in HeroSection and state management in Home component. Also fix email PDF attachment serialization issue in email_service.py.
